case_title: BANK OF THE WEST VS. HUGO ERNESTO FERNANDEZ et al

docket_entries.description: COMMON COUNTS/OPEN BOOK ACCOUNT/COLLECTIONS, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF BANK OF THE WEST AS TO DEFENDANT FERNANDEZ, HUGO ERNESTO INDIVIDUALLY AND DBA FERNANDEZ TRUCKING DOES 1 TO 10, INCL. SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR DEC-12-2008 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  OCT-14-2008 CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT DUE ON         DEC-01-2008
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE OF DEC-12-2008 CONTINUED TO FEB-27-2009 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPT. 212. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT, PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF BANK OF THE WEST SERVED SEP-30-2008, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON CORPORATION AS TO DEFENDANT FERNANDEZ, HUGO ERNESTO INDIVIDUALLY AND DBA FERNANDEZ TRUCKING

REQUEST TO ENTER DEFAULT FILED/DEFAULT ENTERED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS, COST BILL $378.00 FILED, CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED $.00 AS TO DEFENDANT FERNANDEZ, HUGO ERNESTO INDIVIDUALLY AND DBA FERNANDEZ TRUCKING
DECLARATION IN SUPPORT OF DEFAULT JUDGMENT ( EQUQIPMENT VALUATION ) FILED BY PLAINTIFF BANK OF THE WEST
DISMISSAL WITHOUT PREJUDICE AS TO DEFENDANT DOES 1 TO 10, INCL.
DECLARATION IN SUPPORT OF DEFAULT JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF BANK OF THE WEST
DECLARATION OF DOUGLAS HOLLOWAY IN SUPPORT OF DEFAULT JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF BANK OF THE WEST
DECLARATION OF COPIES MADE AS BUSINESS RECORD EVID 1521, 1550 FILED BY PLAINTIFF BANK OF THE WEST

CAUSE CALLED, THE COURT ORDERED THAT PLAINTIFF BANK OF THE WEST HAVE AND RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT FERNANDEZ, HUGO ERNESTO INDIVIDUALLY AND DBA FERNANDEZ TRUCKING POSSESSION OF THE FOLLOWING DESCRIBED PROPERTY, TO WIT: SEE JUDGMENT AT LENGTH RE: EQUIPMENT, PROPERTY VALUE $ 7,500.00, OR IN CASE A DELIVERY OF SAID PROPERTY TO PLAINTIFF CANNOT BE HAD, THEN THAT THE PLAINTIFF HAVE AND RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT $10,143.79 DAMAGES, $1,350.00 ATTORNEY FEES, $378.00 COSTS, $325.26 INTEREST, TOTAL JUDGMENT $12,197.05, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
PRE-TRIAL CALENDAR SWEEP, CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE CALENDAR OF FEB-27-2009, OFF CALENDAR, DISMISSAL OR JUDGMENT ON FILE AS TO ALL DEFENDANTS
